title: A retrieval layer that learns from use
dek: Standard RAG is a lookup into a frozen index. A Hebbian layer lets the weights between chunks shift as you use them, so the same question tomorrow pulls in a different neighborhood than today. A note on building one, and on what a memory actually is.

title: An agent is mostly infrastructure
dek: An agent looks, from the outside, like a conversation with a model. From the inside it is mostly plumbing. This is a note on the part that is plumbing, and on what I am building to make it less tedious.
